revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 28일]][[wuu:二月廿八]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿八]][[zh:二月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 28|qq=February 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Hōji (era)|en|Hōji (era)|qid=Q1327400|lt=Hōchi|1=Hōji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1247|en|1247|qid=Q5482|lt=1247|1=1247}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kangen|en|Kangen|qid=Q1194187|lt=Kangen|1=Kangen}} to {{ill|Hōji (era)|en|Hōji (era)|qid=Q1327400|lt=Hōchi|1=Hōji (era)}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1264|en|1264|qid=Q5514|lt=1264|1=1264}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|奉書船外禁令?|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} the era name was changed from {{ill|Kōchō|en|Kōchō|qid=Q1327323|lt=Kōchi? (or similar)|1=Kōchō}} to {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}}. * {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|qid=Q1193596|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1466|en|1466|qid=Q6559|lt=1466|1=1466}} {{ill|March 14|en|March 14|qid=Q2404|lt=March 14|1=March 14}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kanshō|en|Kanshō|qid=Q1143928|lt=Kanshō|1=Kanshō}} to {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|qid=Q1193596|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunshō}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|ja|弘治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji (Muromachi period)|1=kouji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487351}} to {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|qid=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}}) – The first national isolation edict was issued. The Tokugawa shogunate ordered the Nagasaki bugyō to prohibit the overseas travel of Japanese citizens and banned Christianity. * Kan'ei 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – The Shimabara Rebellion ended with the fall of Shimabara and Hara Castle. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|qid=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} to {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – The Ministry of War was abolished and replaced by the newly established Ministry of the Army and Ministry of the Navy. == Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunka|1=Bun'ei}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1811|en|1811|qid=Q6928|lt=1811|1=1811}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – {{ill|Sakuma Shōzan|en|Sakuma Shōzan|qid=Q739298|lt=Sakuma Shōzan|1=Sakuma Shōzan}}, a thinker and military scholar (died {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – {{ill|Futabatei Shimei|en|Futabatei Shimei|qid=Q22665|lt=Futabatei Shimei|1=Futabatei Shimei}}, a novelist and translator (died {{ill|1909|en|1909|qid=Q2057|lt=1909|1=1909}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1591|en|1591|qid=Q6766|lt=1591|1=1591}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|qid=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|en|Sen no Rikyū|qid=Q305477|lt=Sen no Rikyū|1=Sen no Rikyū}}, a tea master (born {{ill|1522|en|1522|qid=Q6299|lt=1522|1=1522}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – {{ill|Amakusa Shirō|en|Amakusa Shirō|qid=Q452628|lt=Amakusa Shirō|1=Amakusa Shirō}}, the leader of the Shimabara Rebellion (born {{ill|1621|en|1621|qid=Q6812|lt=1621|1=1621}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1821|en|1821|qid=Q6976|lt=1821|1=1821}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|qid=Q2461|lt=March 31|1=March 31}}) – {{ill|Yamagata Bantō|en|Yamagata Bantō|qid=Q6565600|lt=Yamapen Pantsō|1=Yamagata Bantō}}, a merchant and scholar (born {{ill|1748|en|1748|qid=Q7600|lt=1748|1=1748}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|27|2|29|1|28|3|2|0228|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 28일]] [[ja:2月28日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿八]]
[[ar:February 28 (Lunisolar)]]
